seo.description: Learn German through music: curated German songs with original lyrics and English translations. Build vocabulary and listening skills in context—free to explore.
seo.openGraphDescription: German songs with lyrics and English side-by-side translations. Practice German vocabulary and listening with real music.
seo.twitterDescription: German songs with lyrics and English translations. Learn vocabulary in context.

about.title: About German with Music
about.lead: German with Music helps you learn German through songs - with original lyrics, English translations, and study tools that keep vocabulary in context.
about.missionBody: We believe music makes language learning memorable. Instead of isolated word lists, you hear German as native speakers use it, follow along line by line, and reinforce meaning with translations and interactive practice.
offerItems: Browse a curated library of songs in German
Read lyrics with English translations side by side
Review highlighted vocabulary and per-song flashcards
about.audienceBody: Whether you are new to German or refreshing your listening skills, German with Music is for learners who enjoy studying through music at their own pace - at home, on the go, or between classes.
